chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3349 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For orders on Misc. No.14379 of 2025 (urgent) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on Misc. No.14380 of 2025 (exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 18.07.2025. Mr Alqama Bin Mehmood, Advocate for the petitioner is present along with Mohammad Ibrahim/attorney of the Petitioner. 1) Urgency granted. 2) Office objections are disposed of having become infructuous. 3) Exemption is allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4) It is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner is in Dubai and has filed the instant petition through his real cousin Junaid S/o Muhammad Ibrahim seeking protective/transitory bail in FIR No.50 of 2022 under Section 489-F PPC registered at Police Station Malir Cantt. Karachi on the ground that before filing of the FIR he had left Pakistan and therefore was not aware of pendency or registration of the said FIR against him and he has recently came to know and has filed this petition seeking protection from arrest, while returning to Pakistan, at Jinnah Airport, Karachi to surrender before the learned trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the petitioner Adeel Ibrahim Anwar is admitted to protective/transitory bail for a period of 10 (ten) days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- (rupees two hundred thousand only) and P.R. bond in the 2 like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This concession of bail shall remain operative only for ten days from today viz. 18.07.2025 and shall cease to exist on 27.07.2025 or before it when the petitioner surrenders before the trial Court, whichever is earlier.

Without touching the merits of the case, the petitioner Adeel Ibrahim Anwar is admitted to protective/transitory bail for a period of 10 (ten) days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- (rupees two hundred thousand only) and P.R. bond in the 2 like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This concession of bail shall remain operative only for ten days from today viz. 18.07.2025 and shall cease to exist on 27.07.2025 or before it when the petitioner surrenders before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. Instant petition stands dispose of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS/*
